'''Transport Ships''' were aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcrafts]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to transport troops or personnel across bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], they were used to transport [[Echuu Shen-Jon]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to see the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|spy]], [[Utric Sandov]] on the [[Krant]]ian island of [[Le'Roche]].

Another one was used years later to carry [[R2-D5]] [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] during the [[Battle of Hanoon|Battle of New Geddes]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Transport Ships appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
